findings.title: ENV.md missing Stripe and Documenso secret_refs that INTEGRATIONS.md declares
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md declares secret_refs: [STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET] for Stripe and secret_refs: [DOCUMENSO_API_KEY] for Documenso. ENV.md contained zero rows for any of these four vars. The rotation calendar did not cover them; a worker wiring Stripe or Documenso had no ENV.md guidance on scope, source, or rotation.
findings.fix_sketch: Added rows for STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and DOCUMENSO_API_KEY to ENV.md with scope, rotation cadence, and consumed_by fields. Added to rotation calendar. Added STRIPE_* reserved prefix.

findings.title: ADR-0006 contains a lazy reference 'NG-something equivalent' instead of citing the actual Non-Goal ID
findings.detail: In docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md the ADR reads: 'The pick is locked for the sprint (per NON_GOALS.md NG-something equivalent — switching mid-sprint = sprint death).' This is an accepted ADR with a placeholder that was never resolved. The actual reference is SPRINT.md No-gos item 5. Per the ADR append-only invariant this accepted ADR cannot be edited; the vague reference undermines traceability.
findings.fix_sketch: SKIPPED by nightly audit: .claude/settings.json PreToolUse hook blocks all edits to docs/decisions/*.md with status: accepted. Fix requires human to manually add erratum note at the bottom of the ADR, or Sebastian to temporarily authorize the edit. Noted in commit message.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' section only covers 6 of 10 No-Gos from NON_GOALS.md
findings.detail: NON_GOALS.md defines 10 No-Gos. ROADMAP.md 'Not Doing' listed only 6, missing NoGo-5, NoGo-7, NoGo-8, NoGo-9, NoGo-10. Agents reading ROADMAP.md as their 'Not Doing' reference would miss 4 No-Gos, creating a false sense of coverage.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced the ROADMAP Not Doing section with a single pointer to NON_GOALS.md as the canonical source. Removes sync drift permanently.

findings.title: README.md references stale IFleet status memory file (2026-05-13), missing the 2026-05-19 launch
findings.detail: README.md pointed to project_status_20260513.md. The newer entry project_status_20260519.md documents IFleet's launch at commit df0a302 (PR #117). README was actively misleading new contributors.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated README IFleet table row to 'Launched (commit df0a302 / PR #117, 2026-05-19)'. Updated memory path reference to point to MEMORY.md index instead of a hardcoded stale filename.

findings.title: SECURITY.md security.txt references unresolved TBD URLs that will break RFC 9116 compliance
findings.detail: SECURITY.md contained two TBD entries in the security.txt block: Encryption URL and Policy URL. Verbatim mirroring would have produced syntactically invalid security.txt per RFC 9116. Additionally INTEGRATIONS.md had two unverified status page URLs with 'verify URL' flags since 2026-05-15.
findings.fix_sketch: Removed Encryption and Policy lines from security.txt block; added explanatory note that they should be added before publication. Removed 'verify URL' placeholders from Retell and Hostinger status page entries in INTEGRATIONS.md.

findings.title: costs.json references IFleet PR #39 as the cost tracker but no cross-repo write mechanism exists
findings.detail: .omc/costs.json _notes claimed 'Totals recomputed by IFleet cost tracker (PR #39) on every write' but this is the Factory repo. No mechanism exists for IFleet to write to Factory's costs.json across repo boundaries.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated _notes to clarify that Factory's costs.json tracks only Factory Claude sessions, not cross-repo aggregation. Qualified the PR #39 reference to note it lives in IFleet's repo.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md ADR-0010 missing from the Decisions subsection
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md Decisions subsection listed ADR-0001 through ADR-0009 but omitted ADR-0010 ('Issues created by 4 upstream sources + humans'). DECISIONS.md listed all 10. The sync was missed when the CHANGELOG was first written.
findings.fix_sketch: Split the combined ADR-0003/ADR-0010 entry into two separate lines, making ADR-0010 explicit in the Decisions section.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B promised in 4 files but does not exist 2 days after being needed
findings.detail: SPRINT.md, ROADMAP.md, .omc/STATUS.md, and CHANGELOG.md all reference SPRINT-2026-05-B as the immediate next action. Today is 2026-05-22; it should have been opened on or shortly after 2026-05-21. No SPRINT-2026-05-B content existed. The coordination repo's own documented 'Up next' item was unactioned.
findings.fix_sketch: Added SPRINT-2026-05-B pending stub section to SPRINT.md so the reference resolves. Stub explicitly marks itself as needing Sebastian+Esme to fill in the real plan. No content fabricated.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' duplicates the same No-Go in two differently-worded bullets
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md had two bullets both expressing NoGo-1 ('Will NOT compete with Lovable / Bolt / Cursor / v0' and 'Will NOT ship a developer tools for sale product'). Same constraint stated twice with different framing.
findings.fix_sketch: Resolved as a side-effect of fixing AUDIT-factory-4e615356: the entire stale 'Not Doing' section was replaced with a pointer to NON_GOALS.md, eliminating both the incomplete coverage and the duplicate entry simultaneously.
